历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for science (physics category) were approximately 13681 → 14281 → 24047 → 17400 → 23758, showing significant fluctuations. In 2023, there was a clear drop (24047th), and after a brief recovery to 17400th in 2024, it fell again to 23758th in 2025. In recent two years, rankings have been relatively low, with a baseline of about 23758th in 2025. The university's enrollment plan for science (physics category) in Shanxi Province was 110 students in both 2021 and 2022, 111 in 2023, 116 in 2024, and 118 in 2025, showing a gradual small expansion. The 2026 plan is 124 students, an increase of 6 students (+5.08%) compared to 2025, which slightly eases competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university; ranked 45th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Main Ranking (47th in 2025), with a stable upward trend, placing it among the top agricultural and forestry universities in China. Douyin comprehensive popularity ranking is 54th, rated as 'relatively hot', with medium-to-high short video exposure. No significant negative public opinion about Huazhong Agricultural University in 2026 was found in reputation documents, indicating stable overall reputation. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, veterinary medicine A+, animal husbandry A+, crop science A, aquaculture A, and food science and engineering A, totaling 5 A-/A/A+ disciplines, highlighting distinctive agricultural and forestry characteristics, which provide stable attraction for related majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Socially popular majors such as computer science, electronic information/communication, and electrical engineering remain highly sought after, but the university mainly focuses on agriculture and forestry, with stable popularity for related majors. In 2026, there are 167,419 physics category examinees in Shanxi Province, a decrease of about 5,928 (-3.4%) compared to 2025, slightly reducing competition pressure. Huazhong Agricultural University is located in Wuhan, Hubei, in central China, offering some cross-provincial appeal to Shanxi examinees. The university's enrollment proportion in Shanxi is about 1.3%–2.5% (recent years), not a major source province, so regional preference has limited impact.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the relatively low and fluctuating historical rankings in recent two years, the slight expansion of the 2026 enrollment plan (+5.08%), the decrease in physics category examinees (-3.4%), and the rise in Soft Science ranking, competition pressure is slightly eased. It is predicted that the minimum admission ranking in 2026 will shift slightly backward from the 2025 baseline of 23758th. The predicted minimum ranking is about 24533rd, with a range of 24033–25033rd.

If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (within 24033), you can focus on attempting Tier 1 popular majors; if your ranking is near the upper limit (around 25033), you should prioritize Tier 3 safety options.
